column1: Roman Anthony leads the Beat The Streak board today with a steady bat at the top of Boston’s lineup, a strong platoon advantage, and a favorable Fenway setting—everything points to a high-contact night against Reynaldo Lopez. Right behind him, Jarren Duran brings his own lefty spark in the two-hole, riding a similar matchup edge and benefitting from the same hitter-friendly conditions. Brendan Donovan also deserves a look, opening for Colorado with a reliable profile and a prime spot in the order. For those chasing streaks, Anthony is the clear-cut anchor, but there’s no shortage of quality options up and down this list.
